Hot Water: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_hotwater( id bigint(20) AUTO_INCREMENT, timestamp datetime(6), temperature decimal(5,2), setpoint int(11), valve tinyint(1), volume decimal(7,5), pump tinyint(1), flowvolume decimal(7,5), PRIMARY KEY (id)) ENGINE = MyISAM
Mash/Lauter: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_mashlauter(id bigint(20) AUTO_INCREMENT, timestamp datetime(6),temperature decimal(5,2),setpoint int(11),valve tinyint(1),pump tinyint(1),pumpspeed int(11),agiator tinyint(1),agitatorspeed int(11),flowmeter decimal(7,2),PRIMARY KEY (id)) ENGINE = MyISAM
Wort Kettle: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_wortkettle(id bigint(20) AUTO_INCREMENT, timestamp datetime(6),temperature decimal(5,2),setpoint int(11),valve1 tinyint(1),valve2 tinyint(1),chimneytemerature decimal(5,2),chimneyvalve tinyint(1),pump tinyint(1),pumpspeed int(11),flowmeter decimal(7,2),flowvolume int(11),PRIMARY KEY (id)) ENGINE = MyISAM
Ice Water: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_icewater(id bigint(20) AUTO_INCREMENT, timestamp datetime(6),volume decimal(7,5),pump tinyint(1),PRIMARY KEY (id)) ENGINE = MyISAM
Glycol#1: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plc_glycol1(id bigint(20) AUTO_INCREMENT, timestamp datetime(6),temperature decimal(5,2),setpoint int(11),cooler1 tinyint(1),cooler2 tinyint(1),volume decimal(7,5),pump tinyint(1),PRIMARY KEY (id)) ENGINE = MyISAM
